name: LEVI STRAUSS & CO
business: Levi Strauss & Co. designs, markets, and sells jeans, casual and dress pants, activewear, tops, shorts, skirts, dresses, jackets, and accessories under brands including Levi's, Dockers, Levi Strauss Signature, and Beyond Yoga. Products are sold in approximately 120 countries through approximately 50,000 retail locations, including 3,300 brand-dedicated stores and shop-in-shops, as well as company-operated e-commerce sites. The company's top ten wholesale customers accounted for 24% of net revenues in fiscal year 2025, with no single customer representing 10% or more.
sellsTo: wholesale customers (department stores, specialty retailers, mass channel, franchisees)

exposures.sentence: We design, market and sell directly or through third parties and licensees products that include jeans, casual and dress pants, activewear, tops, shorts, skirts, dresses, jackets and related accessories for men, women and children around the world.

Our DTC channel generated 49% and 47% of our net revenues in fiscal years 2025 and 2024, respectively, with our company operated e-commerce business representing 23% and 21% of DTC channel net revenues and 11% and 10% of total net revenues in fiscal years 2025 and 2024, respectively.

In the first quarter of 2024, our Board of Directors approved a multi-year global productivity initiative, Project Fuel, designed to accelerate the execution of our Brand Led and DTC First strategies while fueling long-term profitable growth.
We may be subject to security breaches or other confidential data theft from our systems, which can lead to adverse consequences.

catalysts.event: Launch of Levi's Blue Tab premium collection
catalysts.sentence: In February 2025, we launched the Levi s Blue Tab collection.

catalysts.event: Sale of Dockers intellectual property and U.S./Canada operations
catalysts.sentence: On July 31, 2025 the Company sold the Dockers intellectual property and operations in the U.S. and Canada.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of remaining Dockers sale (Andes, Malaysia, Turkey)
catalysts.sentence: The sale of the Dockers Andes, Malaysia and Turkey operations is expected to close on or around January 30, 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected completion of remaining Dockers sale (Europe and Mexico)
catalysts.sentence: The sale of the Europe and Mexico operations expected to close on or around February 27, 2026.
In January 2026, a cash dividend of $0.14 per share was declared to holders of record of our Class A and Class B common stock at the close of business on February 10, 2026.
